+        total_loss = 0

+        num_batches = 0

+        

+        for batch_idx, batch in enumerate(tqdm(dataloader, desc=f'Epoch {epoch+1}/{args.epochs}')):

+            # Prepare batch for Pi0

+            pi0_batch = prepare_batch_for_pi0(batch, processor, device)

+            

+            # Forward pass

+            loss, info = model(pi0_batch, reduction="mean")

+            

+            # Backward pass

+            optimizer.zero_grad()

+            loss.backward()

+            optimizer.step()

+            

+            total_loss += loss.item()

+            num_batches += 1

+            

+            # Print progress every 10 batches

+            if batch_idx % 10 == 0:

+                print(f'Epoch {epoch+1}, Batch {batch_idx}, Loss: {loss.item():.4f}')

+            

+            # Limit batches for testing purposes

+            if batch_idx >= 20:  # Only process first 20 batches for quick testing

+                break

+        

+        avg_loss = total_loss / num_batches

+        print(f'Epoch {epoch+1} completed. Average Loss: {avg_loss:.4f}')

+    

+    # Save model

+    os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)

+    checkpoint_path = 'checkpoints/final_model.pth'

+if __name__ == '__main__':
